name: MFA not enforced for all users
description: Not all enabled member users have MFA authentication methods registered. Without MFA, accounts are vulnerable to credential theft, phishing, and password spray attacks — the leading cause of Azure breaches.
remediation: Enforce MFA for all users via: (1) Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users and all cloud apps, OR (2) Enable Security Defaults. Use FIDO2 security keys or Microsoft Authenticator for phishing-resistant MFA. Run MFA registration campaign via Entra ID Protection.
